title: Banting chocolate mousse – Made with avo!!!!!!!!

seo.title: Banting chocolate mousse - Made with avo!!!!!!!! - Marinda Kook

html:
Everyone is on the banting wagon. So am I. But the craving for something sweet hits you when you least want it. My sister was visiting and told me about a chocolate mousse you make with avocado pear. I was skeptical, but decided to try it. Well – it is delicious!

 

YOU NEED:

  • 2 ripe avocado pears
  • 100 ml cocoa
  • 100 ml xylitol
  • 5 ml vanilla
  • pinch of salt

NOW:

  1. whisk the avos with a hand whisk until smooth
  2. add the rest of the ingredients and whisk well
  3. spoon into a bowl and chill well in the fridge

I was skeptical. Believe me, you can't tell the difference. It's delicious and very rich. Small bites at a time.
